title: Illagers Wear Armor
body:
Are you tired of Illagers being weak, not wearing anything to protect them?

Do you think raids should be harder?

This mod is for you, with config options to disable certain illagers spawning with armor naturally, or stop all of them from spawning with armor altogether!

As a disclaimer, this mod will not work with the fresh animations resource pack, as this mod has to override the model for illagers.

If you want to edit what armors illagers wear in raids you can make a datapack that overrides the "illager_(armor_slot)" json files.  The original files are on github if you need an example to look at.
